purpose: isolate whether T127d's teacher-only@1M oracle regret (1.9000) is caused by Edax level-16 label quality or by effective sample volume, by training v4/outcome-only on the identical expanded1m train split and, since coverage was far below the 98% threshold, adding an equal-effective-set teacher-only control

provenance.evalCliCaveat: both builds reproduced v2=1.5666666666666667 exactly on the same 60 oracle positions; the difference is due to unrelated engine work landing on main between sessions and rebuilding the shared target/release binary, not a scoring-behavior change observed on this oracle

trainerChange.defaultBehavior: flag absent -> no filtering, manifest/identity byte-for-byte unchanged from before this task
trainerChange.whenPresent: filters the train split to records with outcome.is_some() (applied after the deterministic split, before optional --train-subset-size), adds outcome_matched_only=true to manifest.txt and to the resume identity string

coverage.gateResult: missing (75.5%) far exceeds the 2% threshold, so the equal-effective-set control (requirement 2) was mandatory
coverage.note: much lower coverage than T112's ~19.8% missing at 45k scale; corpus_expanded1m spans WTHOR years 2000-2024 while the outcome lookup table only covers 2015-2023, a plausible but unconfirmed partial explanation

referenceTeacherOnly1mFull.note: all 3 T127d seeds gave identical per-position regret arrays

pairedBootstrapVsOutcomeOnlySameN.note: compares against the position-averaged regret across the 3 outcome-only seeds, at the same effective N=220450

preregisteredInterpretation.rule: outcome-only@1M <= ~1.9 (comparable to teacher-only@1M) => Edax level-16 label quality problem; outcome-only@1M clearly worse (T112 45k reference 3.6-3.8) => label is not the cause, remaining explanation is volume/distribution/trainer differences
preregisteredInterpretation.conclusion: clearly worse branch selected; the equal-N control (teacher-only restricted to the same 220,450 records, 3.8333, statistically indistinguishable from outcome-only's 3.9111) turns this into a positive volume finding rather than an inference by elimination
preregisteredInterpretation.attributedCause: effective sample volume (899,467 vs 220,450), not Edax level-16 label quality
preregisteredInterpretation.relationToT127dAddendum: consistent with, and additive to, the K=4 same-game-density finding from the T127d addendum's 180k probe; this task does not partition the 1M shortfall quantitatively between the two effects

scopeNote: train/src/t090_distillation.rs was the only code change (one opt-in flag + helper + 2 tests). bench/edax-compare/*.py generator files were not modified. No production wiring, adoption decision, or 4M corpus work performed.
